sd-css-removed-select.description: CSS component class 'pf-c-select' was removed in PF v6

incidents.message:
This CSS references the 'pf-c-select' component class which was removed in PatternFly v6.

The Select component was rebuilt and no longer uses this CSS class. This CSS override is dead and should be removed.

Check if the behavior you were overriding is now available via a component prop instead.

The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Use "secondary" instead.

Old: <PageSection variant="light" />
New: <PageSection variant="secondary" />

The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Use "secondary" instead.

Old: <PageSection variant="light" />
New: <PageSection variant="secondary" />

The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Use "secondary" instead.

Old: <PageSection variant="light" />
New: <PageSection variant="secondary" />

The value "alignRight" is no longer valid for the `align` prop on <ToolbarGroup>.
Valid values: "alignStart", "alignEnd", "alignCenter", "2xl"

sd-prop-value-toolbargroup-spacer-spacer.description: Value "spacerMd" removed from `spacer` prop on <ToolbarGroup> (renamed from `spacer`)

incidents.message:
The value "spacerMd" is no longer valid for the `spacer` prop on <ToolbarGroup>.
Note: `spacer` was renamed to `gap`.
Valid values: "gap_2xl", "gap_3xl", "gapXs", "gapXl", "gap_4xl", "2xl", "gapNone", "gapSm", "gapLg", "gapMd"

semver-modal-component-import-deprecated.description: Modal has significant breaking changes — 12 of 28 props removed

The component still exists but its API changed significantly.
Props that were removed have moved to composed child components.
Keep <Modal> and restructure by replacing removed props with child components that provide the same functionality.

Removed props (move to child components):
  - actions
  - bodyAriaLabel
  - bodyAriaRole
  - description
  - footer
  - hasNoBodyWrapper
  - header
  - help
  - showClose
  - title
  - titleIconVariant
  - titleLabel

  - <ModalBody> — wrap relevant content as children
  - <ModalFooter> — wrap relevant content as children
  - <ModalHeader> — pass as props: description, help, title, titleIconVariant

semver-selectoptionobject-component-impo.description: SelectOptionObject has significant breaking changes — 0 of 2 props removed

incidents.message:
MIGRATION: <SelectOptionObject> was removed.

This component has no detected direct replacement.
Replace all <SelectOptionObject> usages with the recommended alternative.

Remove SelectOptionObject from the import statement.This type was part of the deprecated Select API.
The new Select is in '@patternfly/react-core' and uses a composition-based structure:

  <Select>
    <SelectList />
    <SelectOption />
  </Select>

The SelectOptionObject interface was removed and has no direct replacement.
